class_balance: balanced (35/40/25) + class_weight; psychometrics derived from behaviour (train/serve aligned)

calibration.fit: held-out split the RF never trained on (FrozenEstimator, prefit)
calibration.note: Calibrates the served probability only; the RF used for SHAP/feature-importances is unchanged.

data_note: Trained and evaluated on synthetic/illustrative data with realistic class overlap; a screening signal, not a validated clinical instrument.
evaluation_note: Held-out 20% split (seed=42) the model never trained on. Psychometric features use the shared derive_psychometrics() — identical in training and serving.
